hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|tsx|vue)$ ]]; then cd /Users/mstedman/Development/projects/molecule-ui && pnpm lint "$file" --max-warnings=0 2>&1; fi
file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *"packages/types/src"* ]]; then cd/Users/mstedman/Development/projects/molecule-ui && pnpm build:types 2>&1; fi
